examples: He picked out the fake from the real one.
They picked out the winner randomly.
She picked out his voice immediately.
He picked out a gift for his wife.
I picked out this book from the shelf.
I could pick him out in the crowd.
It was hard to pick out details in the dark.
She picked out a dress for the party.
Can you pick out the best option?
Can you pick out the differences?
example_translate: Он выбрал подарок для своей жены.
Я выбрал эту книгу с полки.
Я смог узнать его в толпе.
Было трудно различить детали в темноте.
pick out.synonyms:
Выбирать, выделять - select, choose, pick
Различать, узнавать - identify, recognize, distinguish
